description_long: This robot dog features a robust, mechanical body with four articulated legs, each ending in flat, stable feet for urban terrain. Its main chassis is composed of a dark metallic shell with yellow hazard markings and blue cabling, giving it an industrial, high-tech appearance. The head is rounded and slightly conical, with a flat top and a prominent warning symbol, suggesting a sensor or access panel. The back of the robot dog is equipped with a cylindrical module, likely for power or additional sensors, and is connected to the body via thick, flexible tubing. The legs are jointed at multiple points, allowing for agile movement, and the overall design is compact yet sturdy, suitable for navigating streets and sidewalks. Small details such as visible bolts, panel lines, and warning decals enhance its utilitarian, functional aesthetic.
description: A compact, industrial robot dog with a dark metallic body, yellow hazard markings, blue cabling, and articulated legs, designed for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the rounded head with a warning symbol, articulated legs, and cylindrical module on the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue cabling, jointed legs, and the cylindrical module attached to the back.
description_view_2: Rear and side view emphasizing the back-mounted cylinder, flexible tubing, and the mechanical structure of the legs.
description_view_3: Back and side view showing the cylindrical module, rear legs, and the rounded head with visible panel lines.
